tasks.summary: Initialized EcoCredit AI codebase using Next.js 15, Tailwind CSS, and TypeScript. Ensured high-performance defaults.
Researched latest 2026 EU CSRD/CBAM and Indian BRSR Core environmental regulations to set legally accurate baselines.
Generated a premium dark-mode, glassmorphism homepage visual mockup to validate our neon-green aesthetics.
Engineered the internal CEO 'War Room' dashboard tracking workflows to a premium infographic timeline.
Constructed the multi-step Carbon Audit Engine applying rigorous 2026 BRSR Core math limits.
Built the Monetization Gate, filtering high-intent leads and generating branded 2026 compliance PDFs instantly.
Deployed AEO-optimized GEO Landing Pages with Answer-First logic, Live Matrix Ticker, and the CERC CCC Engine.
Configured Hybrid Edge environment with KV database fallback, finalized Git-to-Pages continuous deployment.
Mission 6.1: Build Error Resolved & Code Hardened - Dynamic Route safely implemented to handle Next 15 parameter Promises.
Overhauled homepage AEO protocol, established the 'Calculated Alpha' brand architecture, and deployed the Industry Playbook strategies.
Architected the dedicated '/results' CRO Engine. Re-routed the Audit Wizard explicitly to the Success Bouncer. Launched specific AEO crawler rulesets.
